name: bb-browser
summary: Use local bb-browser through NextClaw with guided install, daemon and browser readiness checks, site-adapter workflows, and clear browser write boundaries.

summaryI18n.en: Use local bb-browser through NextClaw with guided install, daemon and browser readiness checks, site-adapter workflows, and clear browser write boundaries.
summaryI18n.zh: 在 NextClaw 中使用本地 bb-browser：覆盖安装引导、daemon 与浏览器就绪检查、site adapter 工作流，以及清晰的浏览器写操作边界。

description: Use this skill when the user wants browser-backed web access through the local bb-browser runtime. The skill covers CLI installation, daemon or OpenClaw execution-path choice, browser readiness checks, site adapter discovery, authenticated fetch and browser automation workflows, troubleshooting, and explicit confirmation rules before risky write actions.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when the user wants browser-backed web access through the local bb-browser runtime. The skill covers CLI installation, daemon or OpenClaw execution-path choice, browser readiness checks, site adapter discovery, authenticated fetch and browser automation workflows, troubleshooting, and explicit confirmation rules before risky write actions.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当用户希望通过本地 bb-browser 运行时获得基于真实浏览器登录态的网页访问能力时使用此技能。它覆盖 CLI 安装、daemon 或 OpenClaw 路径选择、浏览器就绪检查、site adapter 发现、带登录态的 fetch 与浏览器自动化工作流、排障路径，以及高风险写操作前的显式确认规则。

author: NextClaw (adapted from epiral)
